{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Northstrider's reflective black orb
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Northstrider]] has a reflective black orb that communicates with him using [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c2">''Reaper'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
